steps.title: Convert distance to gas consumed
steps.content: At 32 miles per gallon, the car uses 1 gallon for every 32 miles driven. This means for d miles, the gas consumed is: $$\frac{d}{32} \text{ gallons}$$

steps.title: Write the remaining gas function
steps.content: The gas remaining equals the initial amount minus what was consumed: $$f(d) = 12 - \frac{d}{32}$$ That matches the correct answer - C is correct.
